key_insights.insight: Building a personal brand based on intellectual property, positioned next to a scalable business model, is key to success in the digital age.
key_insights.quote: As we go into the digital age, what works is to build a personal brand based on your unique intellectual property and then to position that brand next to a scalable, digital, elegant business model.

key_insights.insight: The entrepreneurial apprenticeship, working in a small team with a mentor who has a personal brand, is the best way to learn the new rules of business.
key_insights.quote: An entrepreneur apprenticeship is where you go and work in a small team of less than 12 people, where you have direct contact with an entrepreneur. And in particular, you're looking for an entrepreneur who has somewhat of a personal brand.

key_insights.insight: Publishing your ideas, even in short form, is a rapid way to learn, get feedback, and establish yourself in the public domain.
key_insights.quote: The essence of publishing is that you're taking your ideas and sharing it publicly, putting it in the public domain. That is a very rapid way to get started.

key_insights.insight: To differentiate yourself, focus on providing free value and becoming familiar, and consider being strange, scary, or sexy to cut through the noise.
key_insights.quote: Providing free value and also being familiar, which is clocking up the 7-Eleven for. So free and familiar are the two things that anyone can apply.

key_insights.insight: Productizing the demo and customer needs analysis can validate demand before fully developing a product.
key_insights.quote: Testing demand, the best way to do this is, or one of the best ways to do this, is to productize the demo and a customer needs analysis.

key_insights.insight: Testing book titles as Facebook ads provides real data to guide writing efforts.
key_insights.quote: You should take the book idea you have, and then run it as a Facebook ad, run 100 different titles. And when people click on that Facebook ad, they hit waiting list. Now in that whole process, what you've just done there is you've figured out the exact percentage of people that will click on 100 different ideas.

key_insights.insight: Monetize the top 10% of your audience with premium offerings while providing free value to the bottom 90%.
key_insights.quote: You give free value to 90% of people and you don't ask anything in return, but you monetize the top 10%.

key_insights.insight: To find the entrepreneur sweet spot, balance your passion, the problem you are solving, and the willingness of others to pay for the solution.
key_insights.quote: And the entrepreneur sweet spot is a Venn diagram. And you're trying to balance between your passion, the problem and the value of the problem that you solve, and how much people are willing to pay for that.

key_insights.insight: Entrepreneurs should strive for 'Power Law' opportunities, which involve leverage and offer limitless potential, rather than 'Bell Curve' opportunities that offer incremental improvements.
key_insights.quote: What we have to do is have the courage to move out of bell curves and into power laws.

key_insights.insight: Success is about more than tactics, and a big part of the game comes down to loving what you do and doing it repeatedly to start to compound
key_insights.quote: To go for 10 years at anything, you are going to need to really love the fucking thing.

actionable_advice.advice: Find an entrepreneur with a personal brand and work in their small team.
actionable_advice.how_to: Look for entrepreneurs with 5,000 to 50,000 followers on social media and a business model that inspires you, and reach out to offer your services.

actionable_advice.advice: Start a side hustle that is open and shut within 90 days.
actionable_advice.how_to: Identify a quick project that can be completed within 90 days, such as event planning or seasonal sales, and focus on completing it rather than creating a long-term business.

actionable_advice.advice: Productize the demo and customer needs analysis for your product and offer it for free.
actionable_advice.how_to: Create a presentation explaining the value of your product, gather data from prospective customers and package into a lead magnet

actionable_advice.advice: To change the environment, start with taking time to meet new people in 5 star hotels
actionable_advice.how_to: Schedule coffee and find someone three or four steps ahead of you and meet in an opulent environment

actionable_advice.advice: Prioritize 10-20 hours of podcast appearances in the year ahead.
actionable_advice.how_to: Research relevant podcasts and reach out to hosts with targeted pitches related to your business story and expertise.

memorable_stories: Anecdote about running in Cape Town and encountering young entrepreneurs seeking advice.
Story about losing 90% of revenue during the global financial crisis and writing Key Person of Influence.
Story of climbing Mount Agung in Bali and realizing the value of the mountain he was already standing on.
Personal story of a GP calling and telling him blood markers could mean a health problem
contrarian_claims: Traditional goal setting becomes less effective as your brand grows and attracts unexpected opportunities.
High taxes don't necessarily translate to more tax revenue and can drive wealth creators to other countries.
The most wealth isn't extracted from the economy but rather created with innovation and entrepreneurship
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - The Money Making Expert: The 7,11,4 Hack That Turns $1 Into $10K Per Month! This 90 Day Rule Will 10x Your Income! Daniel Priestley
